name: Bandon Dunes
green_fee_notes: 2026 green fees range seasonally from $130 (January/December) to $375 peak (June to September) for resort guests and $180 to $425 for day guests, with same-day replay rounds at roughly half price.
notable: Walking only: golf carts are prohibited resort-wide except for medical need
Original course at Bandon Dunes Golf Resort (opened May 1999) and David McLay Kidd's breakthrough design
Authentic Scottish-style links routed over dunes on bluffs roughly 100 feet above the Pacific
Strong caddie culture; primary course for the 2020 U.S. Amateur

confidence.course_rating_slope: Ratings verified against USGA NCRDB (CourseID 5776) and the official 2026 scorecard; the USGA-only Tournament tee (7,315 yds, 75.9/145) is omitted, no per-hole yardages published.
confidence.green_fee_tier: Wide seasonal spread ($130 to $425); $$$ reflects the typical shoulder-season day-guest fee rather than peak.
confidence.lat_lng: Resort's own map marker (lodge area, not a specific tee).
confidence.royal_blue_par: USGA NCRDB lists Royal Blue at par 68; the printed scorecard shows a single par-72 row for all tees.
